description_long: This is a medieval knight dressed in a full suit of armor, including a chainmail coif, metal breastplate, and articulated arm and leg guards. The tunic worn over the armor is divided vertically into two contrasting sections, one dark and one ochre, with a heraldic animal silhouette on one side. Flowing fabric strips extend from the waist, adding dynamic movement to the figure. The knight's hands are gloved in armored gauntlets, and a leather belt secures the tunic at the waist. The face is exposed, showing a neutral expression, and the overall attire is historically styled for battle or ceremonial display. The figure stands upright, ready for action or parade.
description: A medieval knight in full armor with a two-toned tunic and flowing fabric strips, standing upright and ready for action.
description_view_0: Front view shows the knight's face, the split-color tunic, and the heraldic animal on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, arm armor, and the dynamic flow of the fabric strips.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the chainmail coif, the split tunic, and the fabric strips extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the arm and leg armor, as well as the movement of the tunic's fabric strips.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval knight armor with chainmail coif, metal breastplate, articulated arm and leg guards, and a belted tunic with flowing fabric strips
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by chainmail coif
